scenes.headline: **AI Trading Bots** Take Over Global Markets
scenes.vo: Welcome to the revolution where **AI Trading Bots** are transforming global markets, one trade at a time. Get ready to dive into the numbers behind this seismic shift. The future of finance is here, and it's automated.

scenes.heading: Key Developments in AI Trading

items.title: AI Trading Bot Adoption Surges 40% in Crypto Markets
SoFi Acquires AI-Based Investing Startup Composer
Toobit Launches AI Trading Assistant for Futures Markets

scenes.vo: Let's break down the **Key Developments in AI Trading** that are making headlines worldwide, from enhanced efficiency to data-driven decision making.

scenes.label: Year-on-Year Increase in AI Trading Tool Adoption in Crypto Markets
scenes.vo: Cryptocurrency markets lead the charge with a staggering **40% year-on-year increase** in AI trading tool adoption. The crypto space is embracing AI faster than ever.

scenes.label: Growth in Automated Trading System Usage in Stock Markets
scenes.vo: Meanwhile, stock markets show a significant **28% rise** in automated trading system usage, indicating a broad adoption across asset classes.

scenes.heading: Advantages of AI Trading Bots
scenes.vo: So, what's driving this trend? **Advantages of AI Trading Bots** include real-time market analysis, automated trend identification, and the elimination of emotional trading decisions.

scenes.quote: AI-augmented strategies have become a core component of daily trading.
scenes.vo: "**AI-augmented strategies have become a core component of daily trading**," according to industry experts, with up to 33% of portfolio returns attributed to AI-driven insights.

scenes.name: Toobit's AI Trading Assistant
scenes.oneLiner: Transforms raw chart data into ready-to-use trade plans.
scenes.vo: Platforms like **Toobit's AI Trading Assistant** are at the forefront, offering instant trade plans, from short-term scalps to long-term swings, with customizable risk-to-reward ratios.

scenes.title: AI Trading Adoption Across Markets
scenes.vo: Looking at **AI Trading Adoption Across Markets**, we see a clear multi-asset growth story, with forex markets also witnessing a notable increase in algorithmic trading penetration.

scenes.headline: **The Future of Investing: Automated**
scenes.cta: Subscribe to The Inference for More Tech Trends
scenes.vo: As we look to the horizon, one thing is clear: **The Future of Investing: Automated**. AI trading bots are no longer the future - they're the present, reshaping retail investment behavior globally.
